material_type: Cold-formed ferritic stainless steel (EN 1.4003 and EN 1.4509)
judgement_calls: Some specimens failed by combined local and overall buckling so interactive failures need to be reviewed

study_id_notes: 1 experimental batch (behzadi2021_A) comprising all 5 physical column tests. They share the exact same hot-rolled 70×70×10 cross-section profile and physical coupon test results
judgement_calls: FEA rows excluded at this stage, Derived Le using k-0.5. This study uses equal-angle sections which introudces asymmetric cross-section nature --> may not be relevant in later stages

study_id_notes: 4 batches cleanly separated by the four tested cross-section sizes (theofanous2009_A through D). theofanous2009_A contained only stub columns and was fully excluded
judgement_calls: Prioritised compressive flat material properties over tensile for extraction. Excluded all 8 stub columns because they failed by pure local buckling. FEA excluded for now, raw w0 was recorded however, a combined loading e was enforced to ensure minimum total effective imperfection was L/1500.
